prompt:
Detailed pencil-drawn diagram about how LLMs work. Dark background (#0a0e14). Ukrainian text. 16:9 widescreen.

Style: Hand-drawn pencil sketch on dark background. White/light gray pencil strokes. Detailed cross-hatching and shading. Think: detailed technical chalk/pencil illustration on blackboard. Rich in detail but hand-crafted feel. Mathematical formulas and symbols scattered in background.

VERTICAL FLOW centered (do not add any title or header at top):

TOP: Large thought cloud drawn in pencil style with many cute flying elephants inside (representing knowledge/tokens). The elephants are sketched in white pencil lines, various sizes, some with wings, some reading books. Text near cloud: 'безмежні знання про світ' in handwritten style.

Pencil-drawn arrow pointing DOWN

MIDDLE: Hand-drawn rectangular box with orange (#f0883e) pencil border. Text inside: 'КОНТЕКСТ'. Some elephants passing through the filter.

Pencil arrow continuing DOWN with 'ПРОМПТ' label in green (#7ee787) handwritten style

BOTTOM: Elephants emerging as output tokens, transforming into text blocks. Text: 'відповідь - наступні токени' in green handwritten style.

Keep the pencil sketch aesthetic throughout - detailed line work, cross-hatching, hand-drawn feel. Rich in detail and charming. Only show the Ukrainian labels specified, nothing else.
